exercises.code:
nodes = [{"role": "link", "name": "Inicio", "id": "n1"}]
print(next(n["id"] for n in nodes if n["role"] == "link" and n["name"] == "Inicio"))

strats = ["css", "role", "testid"]
preferred = ["role", "testid", "css"]
print(sorted(strats, key=lambda s: preferred.index(s)))

nodes = [{"role": "img", "name": "logo"}]
btn = next((n for n in nodes if n["role"] == "button"), None)
print(btn["name"] if btn else "need_testid")

expected, actual = "Portal demo", "Portal demo"
print("pass" if expected == actual else "fail")

import hashlib
print(hashlib.sha256(b"data").hexdigest()[:8])

state = {"token": "t"}
print("reuse" if state.get("token") else "login")

state = "anonymous"
# login ok
state = "authenticated"
print(state)

ev = {"trace": "a.zip", "screenshot": "b.png", "error": "x"}
print(sorted(ev.keys()))

logs = ["ok", "ERR timeout", "nav"]
print([l for l in logs if "ERR" in l])

err = "stale"
action = "goto_home" if err == "stale" else "continue"
print(action)

api = True
print("api" if api else "rpa")
print({"method": "rpa", "reason": "no_api"})
print({"url": "https://demo.local/x", "step": "export", "screenshot": "fail.png"})

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: get_by_role mirrors accessible UI and is more stable than CSS nth-child.
Theory: CAPTCHA → stop and human handoff (no bypass).
Theory: API/export first before browser RPA.
Theory: safe retry only for transient timeout/network, not captcha/403.
